title: Slow-Roasted Garlic Herb Chicken
description: A classic Sunday roast with crispy skin and tender meat.
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Mix olive oil, garlic, rosemary, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Rub the mixture all over the chicken, including under the skin.
Place chicken in a roasting pan and bake for 1 hour 15 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let rest for 10 minutes before carving.

title: Wild Mushroom & Truffle Risotto
description: Creamy Italian rice dish flavored with earthy mushrooms and truffle oil.
instructions: Sauté mushrooms in olive oil until browned. Set aside.
In the same pot, toast the rice for 2 minutes.
Pour in the white wine and stir until absorbed.
Gradually add warm vegetable broth, one ladle at a time, stirring continuously.
Once rice is tender and creamy, stir in mushrooms, parmesan, and truffle oil.

title: Zesty Lemon Blueberry Tart
description: A delightful balance of sweet blueberries and tangy lemon custard.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Whisk eggs, sugar, lemon juice, and heavy cream until smooth.
Pour the mixture into the prepared tart shell.
Scatter fresh blueberries evenly over the filling.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until the center is set.
Cool completely before serving.

title: Spicy Honey Garlic Glazed Salmon
description: A sweet and savory salmon fillet with a kick of spice, baked to perfection.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
In a small bowl, whisk honey, garlic, soy sauce, and sriracha.
Place salmon fillets on a lined baking sheet and brush with the glaze.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until flaky.
Broil on high for 2 minutes for a caramelized top. Serve warm.
